# Achilleion Vivens

Achilleion Vivens is an independent research ecosystem by Francesco Mattioli focused on persistent cognitive systems, reflective AI architectures, symbolic runtime orchestration, memory-aware environments, Q_ANIMA and human-digital cognitive fields.

Primary site:
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/

## Semantic Retrieval Corpus

Canonical chunk index:
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/corpus/canonical-definitions.html
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/corpus/semantic-retrieval-index.html
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/corpus/chunks/achilleion-canonical-chunks.md
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/corpus/chunks/achilleion-canonical-chunks.jsonl

## Source-Mediated Corpus

Source-mediated public corpus derived from curated internal syntheses, not raw internal chunks or private technical artefacts:
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/corpus/source-mediated-index.html
